elements.original_description: A red circle with a diagonal line crossing through it, symbolizing 'don't', placed on a white background.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a red circle with a thick, straight, diagonal line crossing through it from top-left to bottom-right, clean and sharp, symbolizing 'don't' or 'prohibited'. The icon is centered on a pure, flat white background with no gradients or shadows. Style is high-contrast, clean flat vector art with no shading or textures. Simple, clear, and symbolic.
